GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
      GpuProjectExec
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=67108864
          GpuFilterExec
            GpuScanExec: batch_size=67108864
--- memory ---
total_cost=138
GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
    GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=1, output_bytes=8, cost=9
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=1, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=1, cost=17
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
          GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
            GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=16, cost=16
